name: decision-lab
description: A schema-first personal decision operating system with a local bot workflow for investment, finance, and management judgment.

scripts.check: node --check bin/decision-lab.js && node --check src/decision-core.js && node --check src/decision-agent.js && node --check src/decision-export.js && node --check src/decision-tools.js && node --check src/templates.js && node --check test/decision-core.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run doctor
scripts.example:pipeline: node bin/decision-lab.js pipeline "Should we change enterprise pricing?" --type business --slug pricing-example
scripts.example:export: node bin/decision-lab.js export examples --format csv --out outputs/decisions.csv
